CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK('https://cgph.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00O6O000008Sg0VUAS/view?queryScope=userFolders&fv2='& Id,'STEP TWO CLICK HERE')& "..........."& IF(RecordTypeId='012o00000003bUC','USE MPA', HYPERLINK( "https://cgph--c.vf.force.com/flow/Outreach_Invite_to_Submit_Application?varPropID="& Id &"&retURL=https%3A%2F%2Fcgph.lightning.force.com%2Flightning%2Fr%2FHOMEtracker__Property__c%2F"& Id &"%2Fview", "NEW","_Top"))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: YOU MUST DO STEP ONE BEFORE STEP TWO! This report will allow you to send full applications to all the "Eligible, pending staff action" applicants.
CustomField.label: Invite Step Two
